info.name: Agri Schemes — Bharat OneGov (BPP / V1)
info.description:
V1 BPP-side callbacks for agri-schemes government benefits.
Flow: publish → on_confirm → on_status

These requests simulate the BPP sending V1 callbacks to the adapter,
which transforms them to V2 and forwards to the BAP.

Before running:
1. Set bap_id, bap_uri, bpp_id, bpp_uri to your registered participant values.
2. transaction_id must match the one used in the BAP collection (pre-set here).
3. Update order_id in on_confirm and on_status bodies from the real on_confirm response.

request.description:
Sends a V1 on_search catalog response from the BPP adapter.
The adapter transforms it to V2 on_discover and forwards to the BAP.

Provider: PM000074 (Ministry of New and Renewable Energy)
Scheme item: SH0009TH (PM Kusum Solar Agriculture Pumps)

Sends a V1 on_confirm order response from the BPP adapter.
The adapter transforms it to V2 on_confirm and forwards to the BAP.

Order ID: ORD-2026-001234 — matches the BAP status request.
Fulfillment state: Booking-Confirmed.

Sends a V1 on_status order response from the BPP adapter.
The adapter transforms it to V2 on_status and forwards to the BAP.

Order ID: ORD-2026-001234 — matches the BAP status request.
Fulfillment state: Booking-Confirmed.
